name: Sempra
description: Sempra is a prominent utility holding company headquartered in San Diego, California, dedicated to delivering safe, reliable, and affordable energy to approximately 40 million consumers. With a workforce of roughly 20,000 employees, the company focuses on driving electrification and building resilient energy infrastructure across North America. Sempra operates through a diversified portfolio of utility and infrastructure businesses, emphasizing innovation and sustainable growth. By leveraging next-generation technologies and maintaining a high-performance culture, Sempra aims to lead the energy transition while creating long-term value for its shareholders and the communities it serves.
